sutta: 1 now the vulnerable ananda visited the winnable sariputta greeted him and after exchanging the usual polite talk sat down at 1 side so see the vulnerable ananda said this to the venable sariputta how verbal sariputta may among learn new doctrine and doctrines learn remain unconfused and all doctrines to which previously he was mentally attuned remain in use and you get to know something not known the verbal ananda is very learned let the vulnerable ananda illuminate this and november ananda said well then reverend sorry sariputta listen be good heed and i will speak yes sir he rejoined and the verbal ananda said consider reverend sariputta a man who masters dhamma as learned as mastered he teaches others dhamma in detail as learnt as mastered he makes others say it in detail as learned as mastered he makes others repeat it in detail as learned has mastered he ever reflects ever ponders over it in his mind mindfully he pours on it whatsoever abide elders learned in traditional knowledge dharma minders vinaya minders epitomes there he spends pasta rain seasons retreat and visiting them from time to time questions and inquiries of them this talk sir what verily is its aim and their references disclose the undisclosed make as it were a causeway where there is none drive away doubt concerning many perplexing things in this way reverend sariputta among may learn new doctrine and doctrines learned remain unconfused all doctrines to which previously was mentally attuned remain in use and he gets to know something not known excellent amazing reference is all this that has been so well said by the vulnerable ananda we will mind that the vulnerable 1 is endowed with these 6 things the verbal ananda masters dhamma the verbal ananda teaches others dhamma in detail as learned as mastered the verbal ananda makes others say it the verb makes others repeat it the verbal ananda reflects ponders wars on it whereas whoever learned elders abide there the vulnerable ananda spends vasa and he questions them this talks what is its aim and they disclose the undisclosed make a causeway where there is none drive away doubt concerning many perplexing things that's the end of the sutta
commentary: there is another suit which shows the wisdom of verbal ananda and at that time the verbal ananda was only a sotapanna while the variables sariputta was already in arahan and yet still has 1 or 2 things that he could teach to an arahant and it's not that the variable suta is less wise because the vulnerable sarikuta is said to be the highest in wisdom but the as we learned in 1 of the earlier sutras the buddha said it is hard to find somebody equal in wisdom to the rebel ananda the verb ananda [Music] as far as the the most learned as far as the sutas the teachings of the buddha um are concerned he could memorize um he could remember all the sutras taught by the buddha and this utah there are 6 things that are said to be good for a monk to practice first to master dhamma to teach others dharma in detail to make others say it in detail to make others repeat it in detail to ever ponder over it and to spend vasa where there are learned monks in executive
